fields.title: Contact the dread team
fields.description: Siege green. Dreadnoughts are the alliance's hard answer to anything the enemy puts on field.

fields.title: Contact the freighter team
fields.description: If it needs to move, we move it. Freighters handle the logistics runs that keep every corner of the alliance stocked and operational.

fields.title: Contact the technology team
fields.description: The systems that keep us sharp. Technology builds and maintains the tools that reduce overhead and give FL33T an edge inside and outside the game.
